basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Bhadrak (OAVs Bhadrak) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Support Staff. Candidates with HSC, B.A/B.Sc Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through OAVs Bhadrak official website.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bhadrak.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
